title: Data inventory and mapping
text: Organizations shall maintain an up-to-date inventory of personal data processing activities, including purposes, legal basis, recipients, and storage locations.

title: Purpose and use limitation
text: Personal data shall only be used for documented and legitimate purposes communicated to data subjects and reflected in contract terms.

title: Retention and deletion
text: Contracts shall define retention periods and secure deletion procedures, including deletion on termination and deletion verification where feasible.

title: Subprocessor management
text: Processors shall not engage subprocessors without prior authorization and shall impose equivalent privacy and security obligations by written contract.

title: Data subject rights support
text: Service providers shall implement procedures to support access, correction, deletion, portability, and objection requests within statutory timelines.

title: Breach notification obligations
text: Data processors shall notify controllers without undue delay after becoming aware of a personal data breach and provide sufficient incident details.

title: Cross-border transfer safeguards
text: Transfers of personal data across jurisdictions shall rely on valid legal transfer mechanisms and supplementary safeguards where required.

title: Privacy by design
text: Privacy controls shall be integrated into system and process design, including minimization, pseudonymization, and least-privilege access.
